Download the free Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection demo and carry your save data over to the full game.

Coming to PlayStation this Autumn.

#ps5 #ps5games

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Abyssus - Release Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10016582

Play Abyssus, the brinepunk roguelike co-op FPS, available now on PlayStation 5 with full crossplay across all platforms!

Set in a unique brinepunk universe, Abyssus blends intense first-person shooter combat with roguelike progression systems, powerful weapon upgrades, and synergistic blessings that make every run different. Designed for cooperative play, the game emphasizes team coordination, build experimentation, and high-risk, high-reward combat encounters beneath the ocean’s surface.

Launching alongside the console release is the free 1.3 content update, expanding Abyssus with a brand-new God, new blessings, a new area filled with fresh enemies and challenges, additional room objectives, and gameplay improvements, including matchmaking enhancements.

A new premium cosmetic DLC, the Brinerot Pack, is also available for players who want to descend in style! PlayStation 5 players can also get the full Brine Edition (including the base game and four cosmetic DLCs) in both digital and physical versions!

#ps5 #ps5games #abyssus

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Synth Riders - Linkin Park Music Pack Announcement Trailer | PS5 & PS VR2 Games
https://www.playstation.com/games/synth-riders/

The Linkin Park Music Pack brings 13 legendary tracks to Synth Riders on PlayStation VR2 — fully mapped for free-flowing, full-body VR rhythm gameplay.
 
Tracklist includes: In the End, Numb, Faint, One Step Closer, The Emptiness Machine (Explicit), Bleed It Out (Explicit), Breaking the Habit, Battle Symphony, Papercut, Castle of Glass, Heavy Is The Crown, Up From The Bottom, Over Each Other.
 
Purchase songs individually or as a full bundle. Synth Riders (base game) required.

About Synth Riders:

Synth Riders is a free-flowing VR rhythm game developed by Kluge Interactive. Players use motion controllers to hit notes, avoid obstacles, and ride the music in an immersive, full-body experience. With hundreds of songs across multiple genres and an active community of players and creators, Synth Riders is one of the most popular VR fitness and music games available.

#ps5 #ps5games #synthriders #linkinpark

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
PAW Patrol Dino World - The Shores | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10014311

🌊🦖 Parents, the adventure continues in the Shores of PAW Patrol Dino World.

After cleaning the coastline from Mayor Humdinger’s mess, the pups set out on new rescue missions across the sea. From restoring marine life to unlocking new ways to travel across Dino Island, every mission brings new discoveries and challenges.

Join Marshall, Zuma, and the PAW Patrol pups as they dive into prehistoric caves, rescue stranded dinosaurs, and chase clues across the Shores in this open-world video game adventure inspired by the world of the upcoming PAW Patrol Dino Movie.

Are you ready to explore the Shores with your kids? 🌊✨

Coming soon to PlayStation 👉 https://store.playstation.com/concept/10014311 

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #PAWPatrolDinoWorld #PAWPatrol #NickJr

author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Formula Legends - Historic Tracks Pack Announce Trailer | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10012804


Video Description (Consumer Facing):
Expand your Formula Legends experience with historic and modern variations of legendary circuits, including San Marino Motorsports Park, Dutch Dunes Circuit, and Hatchwood Circuit.

Video Keywords (separated by commas, not hashtags): 
Relive the evolution of Formula racing with the Historic Tracks Pack for Formula Legends.

Take on three legendary circuits inspired by iconic motorsport destinations, each recreated across multiple eras of racing history. From unforgiving vintage layouts to refined modern configurations, every track offers a unique challenge and a distinct racing atmosphere.

Included in this pack:

San Marino Motorsports Park – Classic & Modern Variations

Dutch Dunes Circuit – Classic & Modern Variations

Hatchwood Circuit – Vintage & Classic Variations

Master technical corners, flowing elevation changes, high-speed sections, and historic layouts that defined generations of racing.

Experience the past and present of Formula racing in Formula Legends: Historic Tracks Pack.

Dead or Alive 6 Last Round - Launch Trailer | PS5 Games
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/product/JP0106-PPSA34363_00-APPDOA6LR0000001

Intense Fighting Entertainment is back! DEAD OR ALIVE 6 Last Round is available TODAY for purchase and free-to-play!

Play as 29 unique characters, with 5 fan-favorite DOA heroines getting brand-new costumes. Stage and snap pictures in the new Photo Mode, and get a brand-new look at iconic locations with the new OBORO lighting system.

A new original character, Minato, joins the fray later this Summer! Stay tuned for more information!
